note: Universal sheeting grade classification. Country modules may specify different selection criteria.

data.typical_application: Collector roads, local roads, low-speed urban
data.notes: Lowest retroreflectivity. Suitable for roads where approach speed <=60 km/h.

data.technology: Encapsulated glass lens or micro prismatic
data.typical_application: Arterial roads, trunk roads, major urban roads
data.notes: Medium retroreflectivity. Suitable for most arterial and trunk roads.

data.typical_application: Expressways, motorways, overhead signs, gantry signs
data.notes: Highest retroreflectivity. Required for high-speed roads and overhead signs. ASTM D4956 Type XI for permanent works.
